scripts.build: npm run sync:excalidraw-assets && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run android:sync && cd android && ANDROID_HOME=${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Android/Sdk} ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Android/Sdk}} JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/android-studio/jbr} ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:build:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && ANDROID_HOME=${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Android/Sdk} ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=${ANDROID_SDK_ROOT:-${ANDROID_HOME:-$HOME/Android/Sdk}} JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/android-studio/jbr} ./gradlew assembleRelease
